 ## Close Comment
 
-Closing this as better suited for ClawHub/community plugin work after Codex review.
+Closing this as better suited for [ClawHub](https://clawhub.ai/)/community plugin work after Codex review.
 
 The request is a real idea, but current `main` treats this as community-plugin territory rather than an OpenClaw core cleanup item: new channel integrations are documented as plugins, community/ClawHub is the canonical distribution path, and the docs already point to an external Vapi bridge.

 ## Close Comment
 
-Closing this as better suited for ClawHub/community plugin work after Codex review.
+Closing this as better suited for [ClawHub](https://clawhub.ai/)/community plugin work after Codex review.
 
 Current main points this proposal toward an external ClawHub/plugin companion, not OpenClaw core: channel-specific runtime belongs outside core, ClawHub is the intended distribution path, and the built-in docs already cover the core hardening knobs for risky/shared channel ingress.

-Closing this as better suited for ClawHub/community plugin work after Codex review.
